blended.narrative: Discovery is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,744 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
